summary: CLEAN — coder fixed my v2 must-fix at the root cause (SplitAtConditions now reads via `this[i]` so the indexer's lazy `a.Step ??= Step` propagation reaches every action handed to condition.if.Orchestrate) plus kept the `?? false` belt-and-suspenders. Caught two additional latent bugs sharing the same root cause that I missed in v2: alreadyOrchestrating guard-key mismatch (masked pre-fix by the `actions == null` short-circuit) and DisableChildrenOf silently skipped on inner elseifs (leaving sub-steps disabled even when an inner branch matched). 11 LOC across 2 files. Note: no existing test catches any of the three bugs — recommend tester adds a multi-action orchestrate coverage test.
